title: Create: Backtank & Jetpack Curios Compatibility
description: Allows for the usage of Create's backtanks and Create Jetpacks in a Curios back slot.
body:
## Overview
Equip your Create backtanks and jetpacks into a Curios back slot, saving precious armor slots for what you actually want to wear. Compatible with the following [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Create Jetpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-jetpack) items:

- Create: Copper backtank
- Create: Netherite backtank
- Create Jetpack: Jetpack
- Create Jetpack: Netherite jetpack

## Installation
Save the downloaded data pack .zip file to the `datapacks` folder of your world. If the world is live, use the command `/reload` to load it in. For more details check out the [documentation here](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Data_pack?so=search#Usage).

## Compatibility
Currently tested for 1.20.1 and 1.19.2 only, though very much open to expanding that range wherever Create can be applied. Feel free to get in touch via the Github [issues page](https://github.com/villainous-j/create-backtank-jetpack-curios-compatibility-datapack/issues) if you have any requests!
